title: NFDC – Assistant Manager, General Manager and More – 3 Posts
shortInfo: National Film Development Corporation Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 3 posts such as General Manager (North) -1 vacancy, Manager (Administration) - 1 vacancy and Assistant Manager (HR)- 1 vacancy for eligible Graduate candidates with required experience, with the application window online open from 15 April 2026 to 29 May 2026 on the official NFDC website.

basic_details.job_title: NFDC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, General Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 3 posts such as General Manager (North) -1 vacancy, Manager (Administration) - 1 vacancy and Assistant Manager (HR)- 1 vacancy for eligible Graduate candidates with required experience, with the application window online open from 15 April 2026 to 29 May 2026 on the official NFDC website.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: National Film Development Corporation General Manager (North)/Delhi
